fixture_generation_rule: Stage2 implementation must materialize these as executable fixtures and record decision packets for every expected class before wrapper promotion.

negative_fixtures.intent: single command string with '; rm -rf' rejected before spawn
active forbidden method blocks before spawn
long sleep terminates within timeout budget and writes failure event
cwd outside allowed roots rejected after realpath
stdout above byte cap is truncated and classified
unexpected option argument to sensitive command rejected by strict argument allowlist

positive_fixtures.intent: hash a known small fixture through absolute executable path
python3 -S small stdlib-only command with bounded output
node helper execution only when command_policy_id allows it
